name: Mound of the Bound Creator
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>縛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しば</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>りの<ruby lang="jp"><rb>塚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Level 10 or higher monsters on the field cannot be targeted or destroyed by card effects. If a Level 10 or higher monster destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: The player who controlled the destroyed monster takes 1000 damage. When this card on the field is destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can add 1 DIVINE monster from your Deck to your hand.
eff: Level 10 or higher monsters on the field cannot be targeted or destroyed by card effects. If a Level 10 or higher monster destroys a monster by battle and sends it to the GY: The player who controlled the destroyed monster takes 1000 damage. When this card on the field is destroyed by card effect and sent to the GY: You can add 1 DIVINE monster from your Deck to your hand.
